goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'swimmingpool'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'phone number', and 'area'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'south' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool
Make sure you get address, phone number, and area
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the south and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should have a star of 3
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
